title: dcm-anon: DICOM anonymizer with verbatim-cited compliance manifest
description: Open-source DICOM anonymizer implementing the PS3.15 Basic Application Level Confidentiality Profile (Table E.1-1, 2024 edition) with a machine-verifiable, verbatim-cited compliance manifest mapping each PS3.15 action to GDPR Art. 4(5) / Art. 32(1)(a) / Art. 35, HIPAA Safe Harbor (45 CFR 164.514(b)(2)), and EU AI Act Art. 10 clauses. Independent post-run PHI residual verification using a separate tag list. Audit log with SHA-256 tamper-evident chain. Research artifact accompanying ongoing work on fairness-aware Software-as-a-Medical-Device (SaMD).
